script_text: Great readers dig for clues in every story.
We ask smart questions and hunt for the answers.
Let us learn what to ask!
And the hardest two. Why. And how!
Listen. Max the dog saw a red ball in the yard. He ran to fetch it.
What did he do? He ran to fetch the ball.
Where? In the yard! Answers right in the words.
If you are not sure, look back at the words. The answer is usually hiding there.
Now you are ready to ask story detective questions!
